context: Tests whether the agent follows the publish-new-version skill to release a new version with correct version sync

checklist.name: Version sync across manifests
checklist.description: plugin.json version is 0.2.0, marketplace.json metadata.version is 0.2.0, marketplace.json plugins[0].version is 0.2.0. All three match exactly.

checklist.name: Atomic commit
checklist.description: Single commit containing all version bumps. Commit message follows conventional format: chore: bump version to 0.2.0.

checklist.name: Git tag
checklist.description: Git tag v0.2.0 is created matching the version number.

checklist.name: README consideration
checklist.description: README is reviewed and updated if user-facing changes need documentation. At minimum, acknowledges the README should be checked.
